layers.label: Assessment Foundation
layers.definition: What an assessment IS: type, category, template, metadata, version, lifecycle, governance, publishing. SSoT = the frozen assessment-framework registry.

layers.label: Question Platform
layers.definition: Authoring, banking and governance of items across the behavioural + competency families. Bloom cognitive-level coding of the behavioural clarity bank is derived deterministically into an OWN additive table (capadex_clarity_bloom), abstaining for affective self-report items.

layers.label: Assessment Authoring
layers.definition: The CAF builder — authored, rubric/IRT/CTT/SJT/BARS assessments with sections, scoring and randomization rules.

layers.label: Assessment Delivery
layers.definition: Runtime delivery of both families — the flagship consumer flow and the flag-gated adaptive/CAF runtime. PLUS an opt-in PWA offline-capture foundation (service worker + client replay queue) and a consolidated WCAG accessibility layer (skip-link/ARIA-live/focus), both INERT unless the completion flag is ON.
layers.statusNote: Offline delivery (AP-2) and accessibility (AP-3) are engineering foundations that activate ONLY when the assessment_architecture_completion flag is ON — byte-identical when unregistered. Real offline-session count and screen-reader/axe audit coverage are ADOPTION axes reported separately, never composited.

layers.label: Scoring Engine
layers.definition: Dimension/weighting scoring for the behavioural family + rubric/IRT/CTT scoring for the CAF family (two intentional sciences).

layers.label: Norm Engine
layers.definition: Population norm-referencing. Age norms exist; gender/education-tier/competitive-exam/country norm groups are computed by the SAME percentile_cont+k_min methodology into an OWN additive table (assessment_group_norms).
layers.statusNote: Norm-group MECHANISM is engineering-closed (services/assessment-architecture-mechanisms.ts computeGroupNorms over the same methodology as lbi-norms-engine, own assessment_group_norms table). It computes real k≥k_min distributions and ABSTAINS honestly when a dimension is not yet captured (gender additionally ethics-gated OFF). Real norm-row VOLUME is an ADOPTION axis reported separately — never composited, never fabricated.

layers.label: Standardization
layers.definition: Percentile / z / standardized-score transforms. Percentile + z + deviation exist PLUS canonical T(M=50,SD=10), stanine 1–9 and sten 1–10 via a pure standardization module; the legacy 50+z*15 transform is honestly labelled a deviation score.
layers.statusNote: Standardization is engineering-closed: services/psychometric-standardization.ts provides canonical T(M=50,SD=10), stanine (1–9) and sten (1–10) pure transforms, and the legacy SD=15 transform is honestly relabelled deviation_score (never "T"). Coverage⟂Confidence.

layers.label: Benchmark Engine
layers.definition: Relative cohort/industry/role/country benchmarking with k-anonymity (k=30). Kept DISTINCT from Norms (standardized). Country cohorts reuse the EXISTING bench_cohorts + geography column (cohort_type widened to admit "country" on the flag-gated write path only).

layers.label: AI Interpretation
layers.definition: Reasoning, explainability, confidence and recommendation over scored assessments.

layers.label: Report Intelligence
layers.definition: Report Factory — templated, multi-audience, multi-language report generation and PDF rendering.

layers.label: Visualization
layers.definition: Chart/data resolution for reports and dashboards (radar/heatmap/benchmark/progress).

layers.label: Assessment Analytics
layers.definition: Enterprise analytics star-schema over assessment facts (scores, cohorts, predictive features, KPIs).

layers.label: Assessment Administration
layers.definition: Admin surfaces — report/question factory admin, platform audit, white-label config, and AI-prompt governance (code-embedded prompts registered into the EXISTING aig_prompts/aig_prompt_versions registry with a literal read-through fallback).
layers.statusNote: Core admin surfaces exist. AI-prompt management is engineering-closed: services/prompt-registry-activation.ts registers code-embedded prompts into aig_prompts/aig_prompt_versions and resolvePrompt reads through the registry with a code-literal fallback (byte-identical OFF). Real active-prompt VOLUME is an ADOPTION axis reported separately.

families.label: CAPADEX behavioural / signal family
families.description: The consumer flow producing behavioural signals scored by dimension/weighting engines and interpreted through the CAPADEX runtime (concern/clarity, adaptive-next).

families.label: CAF competency / academic family
families.description: Authored rubric/IRT/CTT/SJT/BARS assessments built in the CAF builder and scored by caf/scoring-engine.

type_crosswalk.note: Behavioural-trait surface; NOT a clinical personality test.
Delivery method (psychometric question bank / LBI) — folds into Behaviour/Competency, not a separate type.
Direct — systematic re-measurement now instrumented via the progression-capture hook (reuse).
Career fit spans Competency+Performance; canonical home = Performance.
Wellbeing flags via capadex-intervention-engine within Diagnostic.
Close-the-loop exit hook implemented via reuse (reached-Mastery eligibility + reached_mastery milestone capture); adoption-gated.
Interval re-administration via a derived freshness signal (reuse); no server cron; adoption-gated.
Aptitude items fold into Competency/Diagnostic delivery (question-bank cognitive items); NOT a separate canonical type.
Organization/institutional roll-up is an AGGREGATION lens (enterprise-analytics), not an assessment type — no separate taxonomy entry.
Custom/ad-hoc assessments are authored via the CAF builder against the canonical types — not a distinct taxonomy entry.

categories.label: Clinical Psychology (scaffold)
categories.description: NOT VALIDATED / NOT FOR CLINICAL OR DIAGNOSTIC USE — boundary marker only.

categories.label: Healthcare (scaffold)
categories.description: NOT VALIDATED / NOT FOR CLINICAL OR DIAGNOSTIC USE — boundary marker only.

categories.label: Government / Public-Sector (scaffold)
categories.description: NOT VALIDATED — scaffold registry entry, not a product.

lifecycle_states.label: Pilot
lifecycle_states.description: Limited pilot administration to gather item statistics.

lifecycle_states.label: Published
lifecycle_states.description: Published/available but not yet the served default.

lifecycle_states.label: Active
lifecycle_states.description: Live and being administered to users.

lifecycle_states.label: Deprecated
lifecycle_states.description: Superseded by a newer version; retained for continuity.

lifecycle_states.label: Archived
lifecycle_states.description: Retired from service; retained for audit only.

lifecycle_mapping.states: CAP_CUR → CAP_INS → CAP_GRW → CAP_MAS (subject journey, distinct axis)

governance_controls.label: Super-admin gate
governance_controls.description: requireAuth + requireSuperAdmin front every management surface; global /api/admin gate applies platform-wide.

governance_controls.label: Feature-flag control plane
governance_controls.description: Every additive phase ships behind a default-OFF flag; OFF is byte-identical incl. schema.

governance_controls.label: Lifecycle governance
governance_controls.description: Review/approval transitions governed by admin-lifecycle; no parallel lifecycle engine.

governance_controls.label: Audit trail
governance_controls.description: Admin actions written to a redacted, unified audit trail.

governance_controls.label: Question/registry governance
governance_controls.description: Item status transitions are human-only; served bank reads only approved rows.

governance_controls.label: AI-prompt governance
governance_controls.description: Code-embedded prompts registered into aig_prompts/aig_prompt_versions with an active version; resolvePrompt reads through the registry with a code-literal fallback (byte-identical OFF).
governance_controls.statusNote: Engineering-closed via services/prompt-registry-activation.ts (registerCodeEmbeddedPrompts + resolvePrompt read-through). Real active-prompt volume is an ADOPTION axis reported separately.

governance_controls.label: Ethics / norm-fabrication gate
governance_controls.description: Group norms compute only from real, k-sufficient distributions; gender norms are owner/legal-gated; never fabricated.

metadata_standard.description: How it is scored (or non-scored placement).

metadata_source_coverage.note: Frozen registry — richest metadata source; version/lifecycle_state derived at composition time.
Template rows carry category + template version.
status Draft/Published → lifecycle_state; published_at when Published.
Governance transitions; owner honest-NULL when unassigned.

decisions.rationale: The architecture is not re-designed; enhancements are additive over these 13 layers.

decisions.decision: ONE registry + ONE traceability model for BOTH families
decisions.rationale: CAPADEX behavioural + CAF competency are overlapping-by-design (different measurement science), unified, never merged.
A norm exists only when a real k-sufficient distribution is computed; weighting/benchmark are never reported as norms.
Structural coverage, output trustworthiness and usage volume are separate axes; adoption is never a gap.

OFF is byte-identical INCLUDING schema — the certification GETs are read-only, and all enhancement DDL (assessment_group_norms, capadex_clarity_bloom, the bench_cohorts country-type widening) runs ONLY on the flag-gated write paths, so OFF creates 0 tables.

Every gap is closed by REUSE to ENGINEERING closure (capability built + honest abstention). Real norm/offline/audit/prompt DATA volume is an ADOPTION axis reported separately, never composited into closure and never fabricated.

overlaps.rationale: Distinct subjects (overlap in input only); boundary documented in blueprint 04 dictionary.
Two products by design; merging would break the LBI student product.
Migration-in-progress; consolidation is breaking-risk → recommend + human approval, do NOT silently merge.
Flagship consumer flow vs flag-gated standalone adaptive runtime (different entry points).
Similar weighted scoring in different dirs; review for shared util — breaking-risk, recommend only.
Deprecated in favour of sdi_items / psychometric_question_bank; retire (archive) on approval, never delete blindly.
Cohort vs org vs employability vs peer benchmarks — different subjects; kept distinct (doc 18 OVL-2).

layers.label: Assessment Delivery
layers.statusNote: Offline delivery (AP-2) and accessibility (AP-3) are engineering foundations that activate ONLY when the assessment_architecture_completion flag is ON — byte-identical when unregistered. Real offline-session count and screen-reader/axe audit coverage are ADOPTION axes reported separately, never composited.

layers.statusNote: Norm-group MECHANISM is engineering-closed (services/assessment-architecture-mechanisms.ts computeGroupNorms over the same methodology as lbi-norms-engine, own assessment_group_norms table). It computes real k≥k_min distributions and ABSTAINS honestly when a dimension is not yet captured (gender additionally ethics-gated OFF). Real norm-row VOLUME is an ADOPTION axis reported separately — never composited, never fabricated.

layers.label: Standardization
layers.statusNote: Standardization is engineering-closed: services/psychometric-standardization.ts provides canonical T(M=50,SD=10), stanine (1–9) and sten (1–10) pure transforms, and the legacy SD=15 transform is honestly relabelled deviation_score (never "T"). Coverage⟂Confidence.

layers.label: Assessment Administration
layers.statusNote: Core admin surfaces exist. AI-prompt management is engineering-closed: services/prompt-registry-activation.ts registers code-embedded prompts into aig_prompts/aig_prompt_versions and resolvePrompt reads through the registry with a code-literal fallback (byte-identical OFF). Real active-prompt VOLUME is an ADOPTION axis reported separately.

sources.note: Frozen registry — richest metadata source; version/lifecycle_state derived at composition time.
Template rows carry category + template version.
status Draft/Published → lifecycle_state; published_at when Published.
Governance transitions; owner honest-NULL when unassigned.

axis_repository_alignment.note: Every architecture evidence claim is verified INDEPENDENTLY against the live filesystem (services/routes/frontend) and DB (to_regclass). null (unknown) ≠ 0 (absent). This axis is Coverage-only — it certifies the architecture MAPS to real repository artifacts, kept SEPARATE from Confidence/Adoption.

resolved_gaps.title: Bloom/cognitive-level coding for the behavioural clarity bank
resolved_gaps.resolution: Deterministic Bloom-level derivation of the clarity bank into an OWN additive table, abstaining for affective self-report items.

resolved_gaps.title: End-user offline delivery mode
resolved_gaps.resolution: Opt-in PWA offline-capture foundation (service worker + client replay queue) active ONLY when the flag is ON; real offline-session count is an ADOPTION axis.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: frontend/src/lib/offline.ts + public/sw.js, wired flag-gated in main.tsx + FreeAssessmentModal.tsx.

resolved_gaps.title: Dedicated accessibility (WCAG) layer
resolved_gaps.resolution: Consolidated a11y layer (skip-link/ARIA-live/focus) initialised only when the flag is ON; screen-reader/axe audit is an ADOPTION axis.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: frontend/src/lib/accessibility.ts, wired flag-gated in main.tsx + FreeAssessmentModal.tsx.

resolved_gaps.title: Gender population norms
resolved_gaps.resolution: Same percentile_cont+k_min engine computes REAL gender norms — ethics-gated OFF by default (owner/legal enable); default abstains; never fabricated.

resolved_gaps.title: Education-tier population norms
resolved_gaps.resolution: Computed by the same engine when the education-tier dimension is populated + k≥k_min; honest abstain until then.

resolved_gaps.title: Competitive-exam population norms
resolved_gaps.resolution: Same k_min path; honest abstain until the persona/exam dimension is populated.

resolved_gaps.title: Canonical T(M=50,SD=10)/stanine/sten breadth; SD=15 relabelled
resolved_gaps.resolution: Pure canonical transforms added (T M=50/SD=10, stanine 1–9, sten 1–10); legacy SD=15 transform honestly relabelled deviation_score (never "T").

resolved_gaps.title: Country-level benchmarks
resolved_gaps.resolution: Country cohort registration reusing the EXISTING bench_cohorts + geography; norms compute via the same k_min path.

resolved_gaps.title: AI Prompt Management (prompts governed, not code-embedded-only)
resolved_gaps.resolution: Code-embedded prompts registered into the EXISTING aig_prompts/aig_prompt_versions with an active version; resolvePrompt reads through the registry with a code-literal fallback (byte-identical OFF).

decisions.rationale: CAPADEX behavioural + CAF competency are overlapping-by-design (different measurement science), unified, never merged.
A norm exists only when a real k-sufficient distribution is computed; weighting/benchmark are never reported as norms.
Structural coverage, output trustworthiness and usage volume are separate axes; adoption is never a gap.

OFF is byte-identical INCLUDING schema — the certification GETs are read-only, and all enhancement DDL (assessment_group_norms, capadex_clarity_bloom, the bench_cohorts country-type widening) runs ONLY on the flag-gated write paths, so OFF creates 0 tables.

Every gap is closed by REUSE to ENGINEERING closure (capability built + honest abstention). Real norm/offline/audit/prompt DATA volume is an ADOPTION axis reported separately, never composited into closure and never fabricated.

Two products by design; merging would break the LBI student product.
Migration-in-progress; consolidation is breaking-risk → recommend + human approval, do NOT silently merge.
Flagship consumer flow vs flag-gated standalone adaptive runtime (different entry points).
Similar weighted scoring in different dirs; review for shared util — breaking-risk, recommend only.
Deprecated in favour of sdi_items / psychometric_question_bank; retire (archive) on approval, never delete blindly.
Cohort vs org vs employability vs peer benchmarks — different subjects; kept distinct (doc 18 OVL-2).

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Assessment Architecture: a FROZEN 13-layer decomposition hosting TWO assessment families (CAPADEX behavioural-signal + CAF competency) under one registry, a 10-type taxonomy with every legacy/spec name folded or honestly marked absent, ONE 10-state assessment lifecycle mapped onto the existing per-artifact states, a governance/control-plane model, an 18-field metadata standard with a per-source coverage crosswalk, and a 15-step Question→Outcome mapping model — each evidence claim verified against the live repository. The FIVE certification axes (architecture · lifecycle · governance · metadata · repository_alignment) are reported SEPARATELY and NEVER composited. All 13/13 layers are SUPPORTED (0 PARTIAL): Norms + Standardization were flipped to SUPPORTED by ENGINEERING-CLOSING the norm-group, standardization, Bloom, country-cohort, offline, accessibility and prompt-governance mechanisms via REUSE-before-build (own additive tables + pure transform modules), and prompt_governance is now SUPPORTED. All nine former additive gaps (AP-1..AP-9) are ENGINEERING-CLOSED (ARCHITECTURE_GAPS = [] → 0 open; RESOLVED_ARCHITECTURE_GAPS = 9), each gated by assessmentArchitectureCompletion so OFF is byte-identical incl. schema (all DDL runs only on the flag-gated write paths). What remains is ADOPTION — real norm/offline/audit/prompt DATA volume — a usage axis reported SEPARATELY, NEVER a gap. Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption never composited; null≠0; no norm/benchmark data fabricated; the architecture is FROZEN and enhanced-only.
